abilities.name: simple
abilities.shortEffect: Doubles the Pokémon's stat modifiers. These doubled modifiers are still capped at -6 or 6 stages.
abilities.effect: Each stage of this Pokémon's stat modifiers acts as two stages. These doubled stages are still limited to a minimum of -6 and a maximum of 6. This Pokémon can still accumulate less than -3 or more than 3 stages of stat modifiers, even though the extra ones have no effect after doubling.
abilities.flavorText: Doubles the effects of the Pokémon's stat changes.

abilities.name: unaware
abilities.shortEffect: Ignores other Pokémon's stat modifiers for damage and accuracy calculation.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon ignores other Pokémon's stat modifiers for the purposes of damage and accuracy calculation. Effectively, this affects modifiers of every stat except Speed. The power of Punishment and Stored Power is calculated as usual. When this Pokémon hurts itself in confusion, its stat modifiers affect damage as usual.
abilities.flavorText: When attacking, the Pokémon ignores the target's stat changes.

abilities.name: moody
abilities.shortEffect: Raises a random stat two stages and lowers another one stage after each turn.
abilities.effect: After each turn, one of this Pokémon's stats at random rises two stages, and another falls one stage. If a stat is already at 6 or -6 stages, it will not be chosen to be increased or decreased, respectively.
abilities.flavorText: Every turn, one of the Pokémon's stats will be boosted sharply but another stat will be lowered.
